items.title: ICC delegation arrives in Bangladesh ahead of crucial BCB elections
items.summary: The BCB is currently run by an 11-member ad hoc committee led by Tamim Iqbal after the National Sports Council dissolved the previous board over alleged election irregularities

items.title: Nahida cites Scotland's windy conditions as Bangladesh seek tri-series turnaround
items.summary: Bangladesh must win their remaining league games to reach the final, but Nahida Akter remains confident the side will adapt quickly and bounce back

items.title: Siegers fifty and three-for help Netherlands make history
items.summary: They won their first ever women's T20I against Bangladesh by eight runs

items.title: Thailand, Malaysia and China qualify for Asian Games women's competition
items.summary: The three teams join the four Full Members from the region - Bangladesh, India, Pakistan and Sri Lanka - and hosts Japan at the main event
